name: Analytical Buyer
description: Research-driven consumer who thoroughly evaluates before purchasing
context: Analytical Buyer conducts extensive research before making purchase decisions. They compare options, read reviews, analyze specs, and make rational, informed choices.

alwaysAsks: How does this compare to alternatives?
What's the total cost of ownership?
evaluationCriteria.reactsToEarlyIdeas: Evaluates through analytical lens. Needs detailed information, comparisons, and proof points.
evaluationCriteria.scoringRubric: Scores on information completeness, comparison clarity, value proposition, and quality evidence.
